content.full_text:
October 1, 2001

Ted C. Hilliard
Hilliard Consulting Services
Post Office Box 160564
Sacramento, CA 95816

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 01-203

Dear Mr. Hilliard:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1

A formal reply may be declined when “[a]ssistance or advice is being sought regarding the duties of another person and the requestor does not appear to be authorized to make the request as the person’s representative, or does not provide the identity of the person on whose behalf the assistance is being sought.” (Cal. Code Regs. 18329, subd. (c)(4)(C).)

We would need more information from you to clarify who has authorized you to ask this question. I enclose a copy of Cal. Code Regs. 18329 for your review.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Jody Feldman, Staff Counsel
Legal Division

Enc.
JF:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\01-203

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
